findingDetails.title: Packet 096 active specs were bulk-rewritten into plural-to-plural requirements

title: Packet 096 active specs were bulk-rewritten into plural-to-plural requirements

subject: mixed sk/cli/mcp/deep/system skill prefixes
reason: Current SKILL.md names and skill-graph families intentionally separate cli, mcp, deep-loop, sk-code, sk-util, and system families; stale sk-deep references are drift, not evidence that the whole naming scheme is accidental.

subject: mcp_server/dist singular-root references
reason: Behavioral P0 remains code_graph scope policy, but sampled non-test generated artifacts in search comments and eval ground truth also lag plural source files.

subject: rename packet verification
reason: Smallest useful guard is a singular-root grep outside historical/fixture allowlists plus a plural->same-plural arrow grep in spec docs; packets touching mcp_server source should rebuild dist before commit.

evidence: Local markdown checker scanned 22 packet 096 markdown files and found 0 missing-file or missing-anchor issues.

direction: new singular-root references in requested active scripts/workflows/root docs
evidence: Targeted grep found no new .opencode/(skill|agent|command)/ hits in .opencode/scripts, .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts, .github/workflows, root docs, or top-level scripts beyond already-known install/Barter/dist surfaces.
